A

actor() - Method in record class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.data.LedgerEntry
Returns the value of the actor record component.
actor() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.event.LedgerRecordedEvent
Returns the actor that initiated the transaction (player UUID, CONSOLE, SYSTEM).
addBalance(String, long) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.repository.EconomyRepository
Adds money to a player's bank balance.
addBalance(Connection, String, long) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.repository.EconomyRepository
Adds money to the account using the provided connection.
ADMIN - Enum constant in enum class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.model.MoneySource
Admin-created changes such as /eco give, /eco take, /eco set.
amount() - Method in record class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.data.BankNoteRecord
Returns the value of the amount record component.
amount() - Method in record class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.data.LedgerEntry
Returns the value of the amount record component.
amount() - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.event.LedgerRecordedEvent
Returns the positive amount moved in this transaction.

BalanceCommand - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.command
Command executor for /bal and /balance.
BalanceCommand(Core, EconomyRepository) - Constructor for class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.command.BalanceCommand
Creates a balance command executor.
BankNoteInteractListener - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.listener
Listener that allows players to redeem banknotes by shift-right-clicking while holding them.
BankNoteInteractListener(Core, BankNoteManager) - Constructor for class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.listener.BankNoteInteractListener
Creates a listener that allows players to redeem banknotes by shift-right-clicking while holding them.
BankNoteManager - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.manager
Handles issuing and redeeming physical banknotes.
BankNoteManager(Core, DatabaseManager, EconomyRepository, LedgerRepository, BankNoteRepository) - Constructor for class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.manager.BankNoteManager
Creates a bank note manager.
BankNoteRecord - Record Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.data
Immutable banknote database record.
BankNoteRecord(String, long, long, String, boolean, long, String) - Constructor for record class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.data.BankNoteRecord
Creates an instance of a BankNoteRecord record class.
BankNoteRepository - Class in com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.repository
Repository responsible for persistence of bank notes.
BankNoteRepository(DatabaseManager) - Constructor for class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.repository.BankNoteRepository
Creates a new bank note repository.
burn(String, long, MoneySource, String, String, String) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.manager.TransactionManager
Burns currency from a player's account (removes money).

Manages the Realm SQLite database connection and schema.

Attempts to subtract money from a player's bank balance without allowing it to go below zero.
subtractBalanceFloorZero(Connection, String, long) - Method in class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.repository.EconomyRepository
Attempts to subtract money without allowing a negative balance.

SYSTEM - Enum constant in enum class com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.model.MoneySource
